nasb.text: The cities of the Negev have been locked up, And there is no one to open them; All Judah has been carried into exile, Wholly carried into exile.

esv.text: The cities of the Negeb are shut up, with none to open them; all Judah is taken into exile, wholly taken into exile.

cnv.text: 南地的城市已被圍困， 沒有人能解圍； 整個猶大都被擄走， 全被擄去了。

ccb.text: 南部的城邑将被围困， 无人能解围， 犹大人都要被掳，无一幸免。
